## Summary

Please include a brief description of what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

Please delete options that do not apply:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing experiments or code to change behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Experiment addition
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Linked issue

Closes #(issue number)

If this PR does not close an issue, describe what problem it solves:

## Testing

Please describe how you tested this change:

- [ ] Unit tests pass locally (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] Manual testing in simulator (describe what you ran and observed)
- [ ] RL training converges as expected (if applicable; include metrics)
- [ ] Code follows project style (`ruff check .`, `black --check .`)
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks pass (if enabled)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code is black-formatted and ruff-clean (line length 100)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for new functionality
- [ ] Documentation updated (docstrings, experiment README, or docs/)
- [ ] No new warnings or linting errors
- [ ] Commit message follows project conventions

## Additional notes

Any additional context, screenshots from Foxglove, training logs, or other details that may help the reviewer.
